title: AKA Command
description: A simple plugin for creating command aliases!
body: Full Transcript AKA Command The easiest way to make command aliases! COMMAND ALIASES Supports all types of command aliases, with full subcommand support! Easy interactive prompt in chat to manage all aliases on the server! You can edit, delete and view aliases, all without touching the configuration! CUSTOMIZABLE Every aspect is configurable, without being overloaded! This plugin integrates the fully customizable messages protocol. Send clickable components, make chat menus, send URL's and more! STATISTICS Monitor what commands your players are running, and make an intuitive interface! The plugin closely monitors the commands that players run, and keeps a log of all unknown commands, and then condenses them in a simple interface! PERFORMANCE Whether you are just solving an annoying command, or making a thousand aliases, the plugin keep going! Using a rudimentary command hashing system, the recognition step of the plugin stays snappy and lightweight.
